summary: Photo Courtesy: Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians / Unsplash.com Atlanta, Georgia - April 2, 2026 - Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians (OSSP), a privately owned spine and orthopedic practice headquartered in Atlanta, has grown its network to 63 locations across 18 states. The expansion, which includes more than 20 new locations opened within the past 24 months, positions the organization as one of the largest independently owned orthopedic practices in the United States. Founded in 2013 by Dr. Armin Oskouei, OSSP now employs over 100 spine and orthopedic specialists and records more than 60,000 patient visits each year.
